---
name: Field template request
about: Suggest extraction fields for a research domain
title: "[Field template] "
labels: field-template
assignees: ""
---

## Research domain

Examples: catalysis, materials synthesis, environmental treatment, combustion, electrochemistry.

## Fields to extract

List the fields you want to extract.

## Example field definitions

Provide suggested field names, requirement levels, descriptions, and expected data types.

## Expected output format

Describe the desired Excel/CSV columns or row structure.

## Notes about units and normalization

Mention units, conversions, naming conventions, or normalization rules.
